summary: Auto-exit UI cleanup, gateway docs refresh, and download auth hardening.
release_notes: Auto-exit indication moved from inline ticker cell to a dedicated sub-row beneath the entry order for cleaner readability.
Help and release docs were refreshed for Windows flows, including corrected download URL examples and PowerShell commands.
Download API auth handling now accepts Authorization headers case-insensitively to prevent false 401 errors.
Gateway and TWS connection modes use strictly separated ports with no cross-fallback between 4001/4002 and 7497/7496.
